content:
Hello! This is a visual guide to how to participate in the Unofficial Volunteer Coordination GitHub Repo.
# [HERE'S A LINK TO IT!](https://github.com/omnichromia/morimens-volunteer-coordination)
You're still, of course, welcome to use the [Official BIAV Git](https://github.com/BIAVGit/Morimens-Localizations/tree/main), but this one is organized much better, and the more folks that use it, the easier it is to keep things that way for everyone.
I'll do the work of compiling everyone's work from this system and send it neatly upstream to BIAV whenever they're ready, and make sure that everyone is properly accredited. <:casiah_cute:1408324282895040572> 

# If going to [THIS LINK](https://github.com/omnichromia/morimens-volunteer-coordination) results in an __Error 404__, DM me or post in <#1416615133479960647> with your GitHub name and I'll add you as a contributor.

## This guide assumes that you're using the website (github.com) to interact with the repo.
# 1. Find the section of the game you'd like to work on, and open that file's Ledger.
# 2. Click the Pencil icon to edit the Ledger.

# 3. Find the line for the language you're working on, and replace `(OPEN)` with your name.
## - If that line is not `(OPEN)`, *please work on a different file and come back later.*
# 4. Commit changes to finish signing the Ledger.
- One signature per upload, please; if multiple people are coordinating on a ***single upload***, please sign all of their names on the header.
  - Please don't put your name into "Past Contributions"—I will do that when I compile your contributions.
- Your "Name" can be anything that helps identify who you are on this Discord server.

# 4a. "Commit changes..." will bring up a dialog; click Commit changes again here to confirm.
## - There's no need to change anything here. 
  - You can if you want, any extra info is helpful, but not necessary.

# - It's important that you sign these Ledgers BEFORE WORKING, so that:
  - We don't have multiple people working on the same file in the same language at the same time;
  - Everyone gets properly credited with what work they've done where; and
  - We can keep track of what has and hasn't been done yet.
# 5. Now that you've signed the Ledger, open the main __.xlsx file__, and download it.
- Any one of these buttons will download the same file.

# Thank you for participating! <:mu_goodjob1:1333971081719058464>
# When you're ready, upload the file to <#1446619934565204231>.

## - The only information I __NEED__ is:
- Whether your contribution was __Translation__ or __Proofreading__;
  - It's __Translation__ if you referenced another language (CN, EN, or Gameplay Functions).
  - It's __Proofreading__ if you only referenced your own language.
- The name(s) of __ANY OTHER VOLUNTEER__ that contributed any effort to that contribution.

# - I'll handle the rest! <:celeste_ok:1408324285147254855>
- You're finished and can move on to whatever you're doing next.
- **Please don't edit that Ledger again;** I'll move your name to "Past Contributions" when I compile your contribution.
# ~ [LINK TO COORDINATION REPO](https://github.com/omnichromia/morimens-volunteer-coordination) \~
# \~\~ [JUMP TO TOP OF GUIDE](https://discord.com/channels/1402537664619479100/1419429157779280035/1448551275456102461) \~\~
